languages.text: "Слова сии исполнены уверенности, Домин'{name}, но имя Себериана доселе не прозвучало в устах Неумирающего. Так ли своевременна его казнь?.."

traits.locale_text: "Слова сии исполнены уверенности, Домин'{name}, но имя Себериана доселе не прозвучало в устах Неумирающего. Так ли своевременна его казнь?.."
traits.speaker: KibellahCompanion

traits.locale_text: Драфт: говорит, что имя Себериана не названо, пока еще...

languages.text: "Those words are filled with conviction, Domin'{name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"
languages.original_text: "Слова сии исполнены уверенности, Домин'{name}, но имя Себериана доселе не прозвучало в устах Неумирающего. Так ли своевременна его казнь?.."

"Those words are filled with conviction, Domin'{name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"

languages.text: «Son palabras llenas de convicción, Domin'{name}, pero el nombre de Seberian no ha cruzado los labios del Inmortal. ¿Tan urgente es su ejecución?».
languages.original_text: "Those words are filled with conviction, Domin'{name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"

traits.locale_text: «Son palabras llenas de convicción, Domin'{name}, pero el nombre de Seberian no ha cruzado los labios del Inmortal. ¿Tan urgente es su ejecución?».

languages.text: “那些话充满了信念，秘者{name}，然而塞贝里安之名尚未从不死之神的唇间吐出。此刻处决他，当真合乎时宜吗？”
languages.original_text: "Those words are filled with conviction, Domin'{name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"

traits.locale_text: “那些话充满了信念，秘者{name}，然而塞贝里安之名尚未从不死之神的唇间吐出。此刻处决他，当真合乎时宜吗？”

languages.text: « Ces paroles sont pleines de conviction, Domin'{name}, et pourtant, le nom de Seberian n'a pas encore été prononcé par l'Immortel. Son exécution est-elle réellement opportune ? »
languages.original_text: "Those words are filled with conviction, Domin'{name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"

traits.locale_text: « Ces paroles sont pleines de conviction, Domin'{name}, et pourtant, le nom de Seberian n'a pas encore été prononcé par l'Immortel. Son exécution est-elle réellement opportune ? »

languages.text: "İnanç dolu sözler Domin'{name}. Ancak Seberian'ın adı, Ölmeyen'in dudaklarından henüz dökülmedi. İnfazı gerçekten olması gereken zamanda mı gerçekleşecek?"
languages.original_text: "Those words are filled with conviction, Domin'{name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"

traits.locale_text: "İnanç dolu sözler Domin'{name}. Ancak Seberian'ın adı, Ölmeyen'in dudaklarından henüz dökülmedi. İnfazı gerçekten olması gereken zamanda mı gerçekleşecek?"

languages.text: "Diese Worte sind voller Überzeugung, Domin {name}, aber Seberians Name kam dem Todlosen noch nicht über die Lippen. Steht seine Exekution wirklich bevor?"
languages.original_text: "Those words are filled with conviction, Domin'{name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"

traits.locale_text: "Diese Worte sind voller Überzeugung, Domin {name}, aber Seberians Name kam dem Todlosen noch nicht über die Lippen. Steht seine Exekution wirklich bevor?"

languages.text: "この言葉は確信に満ちている、ドミン{name} 、しかしセベリアンの名はまだ不死の者の口をついていない。彼の処刑は本当に時宜にかなっているのだろうか？
languages.original_text: "These words are filled with conviction, Domin {name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"

traits.locale_text: "この言葉は確信に満ちている、ドミン{name} 、しかしセベリアンの名はまだ不死の者の口をついていない。彼の処刑は本当に時宜にかなっているのだろうか？
